betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Retrievers§f

§aPull specific items and fluids from anywhere in the network toward a single connection point!§f

§bRetrievers§f are attachments that pull items/fluids from other blocks in the duct network into the block they are connected to. Unlike servos (which extract from the adjacent block), retrievers search the entire network.

§6Tiers§f:
§b• Basic§f — §e3 seconds per extraction§f, §e8× stack§f, §e50%§f fluid rate, §e3 filter slots§f.
§b• Hardened§f — §e2 seconds§f, §e16× stack§f, §e75%§f fluid rate, §e6 slots§f.
§b• Reinforced§f — §e1 second§f, §e32× stack§f, §e100%§f fluid rate, §e9 slots§f. Max stored: §e64§f.
§b• Signalum§f — §e0.5 seconds§f, §e64× stack§f, §e2× speed boost§f, §e150%§f fluid rate, §e12 slots§f. Max stored: §e128§f.
§b• Resonant§f — §e0.5 seconds§f, §e64× stack§f, §e3× speed boost§f, §e200%§f fluid rate, §e15 slots§f. Max stored: §e320§f.

§6Routing Modes§f (Reinforced and above):
Nearest-First, Furthest-First, Random, Round Robin.

§eTip§f: Use a Retriever on a chest to pull specific items from across your entire itemduct network — ideal for centralized storage.
